description_long: This structure is a large, wooden dam-like object with a broad, curved central section resembling a half-pipe, flanked by tall, vertical walls. The surface is marked with dark streaks and stains, suggesting weathering or water flow, and features colorful graffiti art on the inner faces. A prominent staircase with railings leads up to a raised platform on one end, providing access to the top of the structure. The entire perimeter is enclosed by metal safety railings, enhancing security for anyone on top. There is a large rectangular opening at the base, possibly for water passage or maintenance access. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a blend of functional and decorative elements.
description: A large, weathered wooden dam structure with a curved central channel, perimeter railings, graffiti art, and a staircase leading to a raised platform.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the dam, the staircase, and the large rectangular opening at the base.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the deep, curved channel and graffiti on the inner wall, with railings visible along the top edges.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tall, flat wall, perimeter railings, and the staircase structure on the right.
description_view_3: View from the opposite end of the channel, showing the staircase, curved interior, and graffiti on the left wall.
